title: AppSec Threat Model (machine-readable)
description: Enterprise module #4. Formal specification of threat-model.json emitted by the security-governance-threat-modeling skill alongside the human-readable threat-model-STRIDE.md. Persisted via `appsec-sdk evidence.append <tag> threat-model`. Feeds downstream automation (security-viz, control.coverage cross-check, remediation routing). The markdown stays the human-rendered view; this JSON is the additive machine view.

schema_version.description: Fixed at 1.0 for this contract version.

system.description: Optional: name of the system / feature / architecture change modeled.

threats.description: The STRIDE threat register, one entry per identified threat. Mirrors threat-model-STRIDE.md §3.

id.description: Stable unique id. Convention: T-NNN (matches markdown register row ids).

stride_category.description: STRIDE category. S=Spoofing, T=Tampering, R=Repudiation, I=Information Disclosure, D=Denial of Service, E=Elevation of Privilege.

component.description: Affected component / flow / trust boundary. SHOULD reference a components.json id or asset-inventory ASSET-id where possible.

attacker.description: Attacker profile (e.g. external, authenticated user, privileged insider, compromised dependency). Optional but recommended.

mitigation.description: Existing control + planned mitigation. What stops / will stop this threat.

disposition.description: Risk treatment decision (classic 4): mitigate | accept | transfer | avoid.

asvs_refs.description: ASVS 5.0 version-pinned identifiers for controls addressing this threat. Empty array allowed when no honest mapping exists.

items.description: Format: v5.0.0-<chapter>.<section>.<requirement> — e.g. v5.0.0-8.1.1. ASVS 4.x labels (V8.1.1) are NOT permitted.

status.description: Lifecycle status of the threat. open | mitigated | accepted.
